betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The undead fascinate me. Bodies retaining action long after their will has gone.
Well, not all of them, some clearly exhibited signs of a clear will. And a language, of some sort.
These undead are different, their bodies have been warped in ways that go beyond a simple zombie, or a walking skeleton.
These creatures resemble some of the monster from the Native American folklore. Is it a coincidence, or is there more to it? How will I even know? It's not like I can come back to check anytime soon...
And Meatballs. Well, the thing I am now holding, it surely resembles a Meatball, with some sort of sauce on it. 
But it has eyes. 
And a voice. 
Whispering.

tag:10.TrophyName:8: Meatball encounter of the third kind
